reference: I have had Lyme disease for seven years and am presently experiencing a bad flare-up of symptoms. I have been taking two different antibiotics since last Thursday. I have read that an infrared sauna will help patients with Lyme disease. Is it okay to use a sauna while taking antibiotics, or does it matter?
